summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3 critical bug fixes: A) Preview button in validation modal, B) Duplicate detection with 409 response, C) DOCX upload preserving file size. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified all features working correctly.

backend: Bug C: DOCX upload preserves file size (36713 bytes uploaded correctly)
Bug C: Downloaded file SHA256 hash matches original file
Bug C: Empty file (0 bytes) rejected with HTTP 400
Bug B: Duplicate upload returns 409 with existing_piece_id, existing_piece_numero, existing_filename
Bug B: force_upload=true allows duplicate import with is_duplicate=true
Bug A: Preview endpoint returns content for DOCX files
Bug A: File download endpoint works correctly
frontend: Bug A: 'Voir' button present in PieceValidationModal
Bug A: FilePreviewModal opens when clicking 'Voir' in validation modal
Bug A: 'Prévisualisation non disponible' message shown for DOCX files
Bug A: 'Télécharger le fichier' button present in FilePreviewModal
Bug B: Upload dialog shows 'Les doublons sont automatiquement détectés' message
Bug B: 'Doublon' badge displayed on duplicate pieces
Bug C: File sizes displayed in piece list (Mo indicator)

seed_data_creation: Created test DOCX file (36713 bytes) for upload testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 critical bugs have been fixed and verified: A) Preview button in validation modal opens FilePreviewModal with 'preview not available' message for DOCX + download button, B) Duplicate detection returns 409 with full details (existing_piece_id, existing_piece_numero, existing_filename), force_upload=true works, C) DOCX upload preserves file size (not 0 bytes), empty files rejected with 400. AI analysis is MOCKED due to budget exhaustion on EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.

bug_a_preview_in_validation.details: PieceValidationModal has 'Voir' button that opens FilePreviewModal. For DOCX files, shows 'Prévisualisation non disponible' message with 'Télécharger' button.

bug_b_duplicate_detection.details: POST /api/dossiers/{id}/pieces returns 409 for duplicates with {existing_piece_id, existing_piece_numero, existing_filename}. Frontend shows 'Doublon détecté' modal with 'Annuler' and 'Importer quand même' options. force_upload=true creates piece with is_duplicate=true.

bug_c_docx_upload.details: DOCX files preserve their size after upload (tested with 36713 byte file). Downloaded file has identical SHA256 hash. Empty files (0 bytes) are rejected with HTTP 400.

mocked_apis.ai_analysis: MOCKED - Gemini AI analysis not working due to budget exhaustion on EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. One piece has mock ai_proposal data for testing validation modal.
